title: Kestävän kehityksen paikallisarvion (VLR) prosessin opas
content:
A Voluntary Local Review (VLR) is a report prepared by the city or municipality to monitor progress towards achieving the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). The VLR serves as a tool for development assessment and knowledge-based management as well as a means of aligning local strategies with global sustainability goals.

This guide presents Finnish cities’ experiences with VLR reporting. There is no one right way, but the guide provides information and ideas to support process planning. The breakdown into concise, basic and comprehensive reporting has been made in order to clarify the structure. In practice, different approaches can be combined flexibly.

You can find Finnish examples of VLR reporting here.

creator: Nina.Palmu-Pietila@kuntaliitto.fi
sourceTitle: Association of Finnish Cities and Municipalities

content: SDG analysis canvas for municipal steering documents, handbook Nina.Palmu-Pie… Mon, 06/26/2023 - 14:20 Type PDF Abstract This handbook provides a pragmatic description of the different stages and issues to be taken into account when using the SDG analysis canvas. The SDG analysis canvas is based on the SDG Impact Assessment Tool of the Gothenburg Centre for Sustainable Development. The City of Helsinki further developed the SDG IAT to create a tool specifically suited to its organisation for the purpose of analysing its steering documents and service plans. title: SDG-analyysiprosessi, työkirja
content: SDG Analysis process, handbook Nina.Palmu-Pie… Thu, 08/25/2022 - 08:16 Type PDF Abstract The SDG Analysis Process is an interactive workshop method developed for the needs of cities, municipalities and other organisations Keyword työpaja vuorovaikutus kestävä kehitys johtaminen kehittäminen kunnat kaupunki Product ID 2188 Language English Number of pages 41 Publisher Association of Finnish Local and Regional Authorities File URI https://julkaisut.kuntaliitto.fi/2188 File Size 5,5 Mt Copyright Kuntaliitto Kuntaliitto Term Teemajulkaisut Product Category Yhdyskunnat ja ympäristö Johtaminen ja kehittäminen Content source Publications Description The SDG Analysis Process is an interactive workshop method developed for the needs of cities, municipalities and other organisations. The process aims to increase organisational SDG expertise and ability to understand and willingness to work towards sustainable development goals. The method can be used as part of the promotion and management of SDGs in cities, municipalities and other organisations. The SDG Analysis Process is a tool co-developed and piloted by Finland’s six largest cities for use of the entire local government sector. Date of

content: Finnish Local Government Reforms from a Research Perspective.
